audience: Hackathon viewers, non-technical users, and makers learning how AI products work

stages.label: User submits concept
stages.whatHappens: The browser captures the concept and starts a traceable explanation run.
stages.output: Local trace start and request intent

stages.label: Streaming request opens
stages.whatHappens: The client opens an SSE request to the explanation endpoint.

stages.label: Server accepts request
stages.whatHappens: The server validates the request and prepares staged generation.

stages.label: First explanation starts
stages.whatHappens: The model starts generating the first readable explanation.

stages.label: Learning layer starts
stages.whatHappens: The model generates story, steps, and challenge data.

stages.label: Visual layer starts
stages.whatHappens: The model generates structured visual breakdown data.

stages.label: Result merged and saved
stages.whatHappens: The client merges staged outputs, stores local history, and enables sharing.
stages.risk: Partial save or degraded visual layer

events.name: complete
events.safeSummary: The final result was merged and saved locally.

redactionRules: Do not show API keys or provider credentials.
Do not show raw model prompts or complete model responses.
Do not show full request bodies.
Show only concept labels, stage names, counts, durations, and safe summaries.
